name: cella
description: Cella is a TypeScript template to build collaborative web apps with sync engine. MIT licensed.
author: CellaJS <info@cellajs.com>

scripts.docker:test: docker compose -f backend/compose.yaml --profile test up -d --wait db_test
scripts.sdk: pnpm --filter backend generate:openapi && pnpm --filter sdk generate:sdk
scripts.dev:single: pnpm clean && cross-env SINGLE_VM=true pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter backend --filter frontend dev
scripts.dev:proxy: pnpm clean && cross-env pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter backend --filter cdc --filter frontend --filter proxy dev
scripts.check: pnpm sdk && pnpm --filter backend ts && pnpm -r --filter '!backend' ts && pnpm --filter shared lens:check && pnpm lint:fix
scripts.tsperf: pnpm --filter backend tsperf && pnpm --filter frontend tsperf && pnpm --filter cdc tsperf && pnpm --filter yjs-worker tsperf
scripts.test:core: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=core vitest run --silent=passed-only
scripts.test:core:verbose: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=core vitest run
scripts.test:full: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=full COVERAGE_REPORTERS=summary vitest run --coverage.enabled --silent=passed-only
scripts.test:full:verbose: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=full vitest run
scripts.test:update: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=core vitest run -u
scripts.offline: cross-env pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter backend --filter cdc dev & pnpm --filter frontend offline
